title: AppleSkin Vanilla!     (Food Information)
description: This texture pack adds food information to Items in Minecraft without the need to install any Mods!
body: ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1126519/description_a88321bd-c36e-4f18-a8cc-756fc80e6800.png) This is a texture pack that adds food information to Items in Minecraft without the need to install any Mods!  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/992/572/food_text_items.png)   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1126519/description_7fbfcd32-146b-4905-96c0-0f6fbe5bf249.png) This Resourcepack is available in a HUGE number of Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, Italian, etc. This Resourcepack is Compatible with: Optifine, Embeddium, Rubiddium,  Sodium.  ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1126519/description_e499b5ac-b70a-4245-bcc8-e20c07043bc4.png) If you like to support us, you can Join our  Discord or Support us monetarily on our  Patreon
